hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.generated.go) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"BLOCKED: *.generated.go is code-generated (DO NOT EDIT). Edit codegen/customizations.yml or a hand-written sibling .go file, then regenerate with: go generate unifi/codegen.go"}}' ;; esac; }
